package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessTransactionPerRowBulkWrite() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_database_access_transaction_per_row_bulk_write"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Database access. Flag bulk writes that open and commit one transaction per row."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
